question: When a LINAC is used to treat patients in electron mode, which of the following hardware is not needed?
text:
Question: When a LINAC is used to treat patients in electron mode, which of the following hardware is not needed?
Options:
A. Target
B. Electron gun
C. Monitor chamber
D. Scattering foil
label: A

question: Which of the following parameters is the most important for cone beam CT (CBCT) used in IGRT?

choices.choice_text: Coincidence between the CBCT isocenter and the radiation beam isocenter

text:
Question: Which of the following parameters is the most important for cone beam CT (CBCT) used in IGRT?
Options:
A. HU accuracy
B. Coincidence between the CBCT isocenter and the radiation beam isocenter
C. Spatial resolution
D. Field of view
label: B

question: Which of the following devices is not suitable for in-vivo dose measurements?
text:
Question: Which of the following devices is not suitable for in-vivo dose measurements?
Options:
A. Diodes
B. Thermoluminescent dosimeters (TLDs)
C. Ionization chambers
D. Optically stimulated luminescence dosimeters (OSLDs)
label: C

question: Which of the following statements about RBE for protons is correct?

choices.choice_text: It is always a constant 1.1 for all depths.
It is the highest at the shallow depth.
It is the highest at the center of spread-out Bragg peak.
It is the highest at the distal fall off depth.

text:
Question: Which of the following statements about RBE for protons is correct?
Options:
A. It is always a constant 1.1 for all depths.
B. It is the highest at the shallow depth.
C. It is the highest at the center of spread-out Bragg peak.
D. It is the highest at the distal fall off depth.
label: D

question: Which statement below is true for TBI treatment?

choices.choice_text: Lung block is always needed when lateral opposed beams are used.
FFF mode is used to increase the dose rate.
The extended SSD increases the dose uniformity.
The treatment is faster than it is for regular patients.

text:
Question: Which statement below is true for TBI treatment?
Options:
A. Lung block is always needed when lateral opposed beams are used.
B. FFF mode is used to increase the dose rate.
C. The extended SSD increases the dose uniformity.
D. The treatment is faster than it is for regular patients.
label: C

question: Which of the following tests is not a typical procedure for HDR brachytherapy?

choices.choice_text: Calibrating the source when a new source is used.
Changing the source at a frequency of 3-4 months.
Performing daily QA in the days only when patient treatment is scheduled.
Performing patient surveys only before the treatment.

text:
Question: Which of the following tests is not a typical procedure for HDR brachytherapy?
Options:
A. Calibrating the source when a new source is used.
B. Changing the source at a frequency of 3-4 months.
C. Performing daily QA in the days only when patient treatment is scheduled.
D. Performing patient surveys only before the treatment.
label: D

question: The mass attenuation coefficient has the highest dependence on the atomic number of the medium and the energy of the incoming photon energy for ___.
text:
Question: The mass attenuation coefficient has the highest dependence on the atomic number of the medium and the energy of the incoming photon energy for ___.
Options:
A. Photoelectric effect
B. Compton scattering
C. Pair production
D. Rayleigh scatter
label: A

question: Which of the following parameters is not needed in shielding calculations for the 2nd barriers?
text:
Question: Which of the following parameters is not needed in shielding calculations for the 2nd barriers?
Options:
A. Distance.
B. Occupancy factor.
C. Use factor.
D. Workload.
label: C
